content:
[Intro]

[ch]G[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]Cadd9[/ch] 

[tab][ch]G[/ch] 
I don't want a lot for Christmas [/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch] 
there is just one thing I need [/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch] 
I don't care about the presents [/tab]
[tab][ch]Cadd9[/ch] 
underneath the Christmas tree [/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
I just want you for my ow n [/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                 [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
more than you could ever  know [/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                 [ch]E7[/ch] 
Make my wish come  true... [/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                   [ch]D[/ch] 
All I want for Christmas is you [/tab]

[ch]G[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] 


[Verse 1]

[tab][ch]G[/ch] 
I don't want a lot for Christmas there is just one thing I need [/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                               [ch]Cadd9[/ch] 
I don't care about the presents  underneath the Christmas tree [/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch] 
I don't need to hang my stocking there upon the fireplace [/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                                [ch]Cadd9[/ch] 
Santa Claus won't make me happy  with a toy on Christmas day [/tab]


[Hook]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]                            [ch]Em[/ch]                       
I just want you for my  own  more than you could ever  know [/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                  [ch]E7[/ch]       [ch]Am[/ch]              [ch]D[/ch] 
Make my wish come  true...  All I want for  Christmas is you, you, baby [/tab]

[ch]G[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] 


[Verse 2]

[tab][ch]G[/ch] 
I won't ask for much this Christmas I won't even wish for snow [/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                               [ch]Cadd9[/ch] 
I'm just gonna keep on waiting  underneath the mistletoe [/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch] 
I won't make a list and send it to the North Pole for Saint Nick [/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                           [ch]Cadd9[/ch] 
I won't even stay awake to  hear those magic reindeer click [/tab]


[Hook]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]                      [ch]Em[/ch]             [ch]Cadd9[/ch] 
'Cause I just want you here to night  holding on to me so  tight [/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                [ch]E7[/ch]        [ch]Am[/ch]             [ch]D[/ch] 
What more can I  do, baby  All I want for  Christmas is you [/tab]

[ch]G[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] 


[Bridge]

[tab][ch]B[/ch]                           [ch]Em[/ch] 
All the lights are shining  brightly everywhere [/tab]
[tab][ch]B[/ch]                          [ch]Em[/ch] 
And the sound of children  laughter fills the air [/tab]
[tab][ch]Cadd9[/ch]                        [ch]G[/ch]              [ch]E7[/ch] 
and everyone is singing   I hear those s leigh bells ringing [/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch] 
Santa won't you bring me the one I really need [/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch] 
won't you  please bring my baby to me [/tab]


[Hook]

[tab][ch]G[/ch] 
Oh I don't want a lot for Christmas this is all I'm asking for [/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                           [ch]Cadd9[/ch] 
I just want to see my baby  standing right outside my door [/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                          [ch]Em[/ch]                            [ch]Eb[/ch] 
Oh I just want him for my  own  more than you could ever  know [/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]              [ch]E7[/ch]        [ch]Am[/ch]                [ch]D[/ch] 
Make my wish come  true, al l I want for Ch ristmas is you... [/tab]


[Outro]

[ch]G[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
